description: Thymeleaf is an open-source server-side Java template engine for web and standalone environments. The thymeleaf.org site provides tutorials, downloads, and API/Javadoc documentation for the library.
summary: thymeleaf.org exposes documentation and Javadocs for a Java template engine, but no public developer integration surfaces such as HTTP/REST APIs, GraphQL APIs, MCP servers, or CLIs on thymeleaf.org.
